headline: Woman's 'I'm An Empath' Is Actually Just Her Projecting Her Feelings Onto Everyone Else
summary: 'You seem angry,' Amanda said. 'I'm fine,' her friend said. 'No, you're not,' Amanda insisted. Now her friend is angry.
fullBody: Amanda Empath claims she 'feels others' emotions.' Translation: she tells you how you feel, then gets upset when you disagree. 'You're sad,' Amanda said. 'I'm actually happy,' her friend said. 'No, you're not,' Amanda said. Now her friend is sad — because Amanda won't stop. 'I knew it,' Amanda said. Her friends have started a 'Amanda Feelings' support group. 'She's exhausting,' one said. 'I feel it,' Amanda said.
